CREATE TABLE bindingTemplates (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100), description TEXT, service_id INT, created_at TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE services (id INT PRIMARY KEY, service_name VARCHAR(100), owner_id INT, created_at TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE business_apis (id INT PRIMARY KEY, api_name VARCHAR(100), binding_template_id INT, endpoint VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO bindingTemplates (id, name, description, service_id, created_at) VALUES (1, 'Template1', 'First binding template', 1, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO services (id, service_name, owner_id, created_at) VALUES (1, 'Service1', 1, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO business_apis (id, api_name, binding_template_id, endpoint) VALUES (1, 'API1', 1, 'http://example.com/api1');
SELECT * FROM bindingTemplates WHERE id = (SELECT binding_template_id FROM business_apis WHERE api_name = 'API1') AND service_id = (SELECT id FROM services WHERE service_name = 'Service1');
SELECT b.id, b.name, b.description FROM bindingTemplates b JOIN business_apis a ON b.id = a.binding_template_id WHERE a.endpoint LIKE 'http://%' AND a.api_name IS NOT NULL;
SELECT b.name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM business_apis WHERE binding_template_id = b.id) AS api_count FROM bindingTemplates b WHERE b.created_at >= '2023-01-01 00:00:00' ORDER BY api_count DESC;
SELECT b.name, s.service_name FROM bindingTemplates b LEFT JOIN services s ON b.service_id = s.id WHERE s.owner_id IS NOT NULL OR b.description ILIKE '%template%';
SELECT b.id FROM bindingTemplates b WHERE b.created_at < (SELECT MIN(created_at) FROM bindingTemplates) ORDER BY b.created_at DESC LIMIT 1;
